'''layowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibazocine|ibazocine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-y-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibazocine|ibazocine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| layowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læyeweth|læyeweth]] || [[word:læyewej|læyewej]] || [[word:læyewesh|læyewesh]] || [[word:læyewe|læyewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:layoyowoth|layoyowoth]] || [[word:layoyowoj|layoyowoj]] || [[word:layoyowosh|layoyowosh]] || [[word:layoyowo|layoyowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:layowoth|layowoth]] || [[word:layowoj|layowoj]] || [[word:layowosh|layowosh]] || [[word:layowo|layowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:layofwoth|layofwoth]] || [[word:layofwoj|layofwoj]] || [[word:layofwosh|layofwosh]] || [[word:layofwof|layofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:layowotho|layowotho]] || [[word:layowojo|layowojo]] || [[word:layowosho|layowosho]] || [[word:layowoko|layowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:layowoth|layowoth]] || [[word:layowoj|layowoj]] || [[word:layowosh|layowosh]] || [[word:layowo|layowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:layowothol|layowothol]] || [[word:layowojol|layowojol]] || [[word:layowoshol|layowoshol]] || [[word:layowokol|layowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:layowothotho|layowothotho]] || [[word:layowojojo|layowojojo]] || [[word:layowoshosho|layowoshosho]] || [[word:layowoko|layowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:layowothon|layowothon]] || [[word:layowojon|layowojon]] || [[word:layowoshon|layowoshon]] || [[word:layowokon|layowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:layowothoro|layowothoro]] || [[word:layowojoro|layowojoro]] || [[word:layowoshoro|layowoshoro]] || [[word:layowokoro|layowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
